22234 Bluewater Ct SE, Yelm, WA 98597, USA

Tree/Pearl Oyster Mushrooms growing all over around Blue Lake and Clear Lake trails. Almost never harvested. Red Huckleberries are very abundant. Lots of variety of native herbs, mushrooms, and berries. Only accessible to the public with a boat to row or motor
